title: Do You Need German in Berlin? - Quick Summary
items: **No, you do not need German for a normal Berlin trip:** English works well in central districts, museums, hotels, restaurants and tours.
**The best phrase to learn is simple:** Entschuldigung, sprechen Sie Englisch? It is polite, practical and changes the tone immediately.
**English gets harder outside the center:** small shops, pharmacies, doctors, outer districts and government offices are less predictable.
**Restaurant German is worth learning:** Die Rechnung, bitte, zusammen/getrennt and mit Karte/bar solve many small payment moments.
**A little German is about respect, not fluency:** greetings, thanks and one polite question are enough for a first visit.
